headline: Crypto Mystique Fades as Enterprise Blockchain Demand Shifts to Utility
summary: Financial Times signals diminishing appetite for speculative Bitcoin narratives, reflecting a broader market maturation away from crypto mysticism toward practical distributed ledger applications. Enterprise clients are increasingly bypassing headline-grabbing crypto plays in favor of auditable, permissioned blockchain infrastructure. This shift redirects ISV and GSI attention toward cloud-hosted blockchain services with clear compliance and integration stories.
oci_implication: OCI is positioned to capture enterprise blockchain workloads as customers deprioritize speculative crypto and demand regulated, scalable infrastructure — an opening to deepen engagements with FSI-focused GSIs and ISVs building on OCI's sovereign and compliance-grade cloud capabilities.
